title: Cryptoheros sajica
author: Juan J. Schmitter-Soto
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: Cr. sajica:  USNM 211617 (20 paratypes), Costa Rica, Puntarenas, a tributary of Río Sierpe, 2 km S of Palmar Sur; MHNG 2447.21 (1), Costa Rica, Puntarenas, Río Ceiba; UMMZ 194210 (4), UMMZ 194239 (28, 2 C&S, 8 dig.), Costa Rica, Puntarenas, a tributary to Río Ceiba, just above mouth.
